intro: Ardisia sinoaustralis, also known as Chinese ardisia, is a medicinal plant species in the family Myrsinaceae. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
